title: Trump considers it 'treasonous' to say US isn't winning the war with Iran
snippet: Trump at The Villages, FL: called it 'treasonous' to say US isn't winning the war with Iran, despite same-day letter to Congress claiming hostilities 'terminated.' Contradiction: war is simultaneously 'terminated' and being 'won.' Signals continued escalatory rhetoric.
tag_reason: 트럼프의 '반역' 발언은 '종료 선언'과 동일한 날 발생한 모순적 신규 발언
